markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 26, 2026 9 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 88.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 88.99° on Jun 26, 2026 at 9pm EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nasim Nuñez records 2+ RBIs in Washington vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Nasim Nuñez is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Nasim Nuñez starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Nasim Nuñez is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Nasim Nuñez is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
markets.title: Nasim Nuñez: 2+ RBIs?

markets.rules_primary: If Dylan Crews records 1+ RBIs in Washington vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Dylan Crews is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Dylan Crews starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Dylan Crews is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Dylan Crews is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
markets.title: Dylan Crews: 1+ RBIs?
